channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Generating in the Limit with Infinitely Many Hallucinations
item.description: Generating in the Limit with Infinitely Many Hallucinations

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Extracting Knowledge from an Arabic-English Machine-Readable Dictionary Using Information Extraction
item.description: Extracting Knowledge from an Arabic-English Machine-Readable Dictionary Using Information Extraction

item.description: Developmental Trajectories of Situation Modeling and Mentalizing in Transformer Language Models

item.description: Legal Domain Adaptation of Modern BERT Models

item.description: Depth-Staggered Fibonacci Spacing for Sparse Attention: Static Schedules Beat Learned Dilation and Extrapolate Where Dense Attention Fails

item.description: SEAD: Competence-Aware On-Policy Distillation via Entropy-Guided Supervision

item.description: Correct codes for the wrong reasons? validating LLMs as measurement instruments for theoretical constructs

item.description: Phonological Perception of Sign Language Models

item.description: AnTenA: Actionable and Explainable Tensor Analysis System with Large Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SEATauBench: Adapting Tool-Agent-User Evaluation Into Low-Resource Southeast Asian Languages
item.description: SEATauBench: Adapting Tool-Agent-User Evaluation Into Low-Resource Southeast Asian Languages

item.description: DriftGuard: Safety-Aware Multi-Monitor Detection and Selective Adaptation for Evolving Toxicity Moderation

item.description: 5ting at SemEval-2026 Task 8: Strong End-to-End Multi-Turn RAG via LLM-Based Reranking and Faithfulness Control

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Majority Vote Silences Minority Values: Annotator Disagreement at the Hate/Offensive Boundary in HateXplain
item.description: Majority Vote Silences Minority Values: Annotator Disagreement at the Hate/Offensive Boundary in HateXplain

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Structure-Preserving Document Translation via Multi-Stage LLM Pipeline: A Case Study in Marathi
item.description: Structure-Preserving Document Translation via Multi-Stage LLM Pipeline: A Case Study in Marathi

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Labeling Training Data for Entity Matching Using Large Language Models
item.description: Labeling Training Data for Entity Matching Using Large Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Heterogeneous Safety Impacts of Benign Multilingual Fine-Tuning
item.description: The Heterogeneous Safety Impacts of Benign Multilingual Fine-Tuning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Open but Incompatible: A License Compatibility Analysis of Corpora for Low-Resource African Languages
item.description: Open but Incompatible: A License Compatibility Analysis of Corpora for Low-Resource African Languages

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Memory-Managed Long-Context Attention: A Preliminary Study of Editable Request-Local Memory
item.description: Memory-Managed Long-Context Attention: A Preliminary Study of Editable Request-Local Memory

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] PASTA: A Paraphrasing And Self-Training Approach for Knowledge Updating in LLMs
item.description: PASTA: A Paraphrasing And Self-Training Approach for Knowledge Updating in LLMs

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Latent Bridges for Multi-Table Question Answering
item.description: Latent Bridges for Multi-Table Question Answering

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] FinInvest-GTCN: Explainable Graph-Temporal-Causal Modeling for Risk-Aware Investment Decision Optimization
item.description: FinInvest-GTCN: Explainable Graph-Temporal-Causal Modeling for Risk-Aware Investment Decision Optimization

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] EVLA: An Electro-Aware Multimodal Assistant for Physically-Grounded Driving Reasoning and Control
item.description: EVLA: An Electro-Aware Multimodal Assistant for Physically-Grounded Driving Reasoning and Control

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A3M: Adaptive, Adversarial and Multi-Objective Learning for Strategic Bidding in Repeated Auctions
item.description: A3M: Adaptive, Adversarial and Multi-Objective Learning for Strategic Bidding in Repeated Auctions

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Beyond the Mean: Three-Axis Fidelity for Aligning LLM-Based Survey Simulators from Small Pilot Data
item.description: Beyond the Mean: Three-Axis Fidelity for Aligning LLM-Based Survey Simulators from Small Pilot Data

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Can LLMs Hire Fairly? Racial Bias in Resume Screening
item.description: Can LLMs Hire Fairly? Racial Bias in Resume Screening

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Fine-Tuning General-Purpose Large Language Models for Agricultural Applications:A Reproducible Framework and Evaluation Protocol Based on Qwen3-8B
item.description: Fine-Tuning General-Purpose Large Language Models for Agricultural Applications:A Reproducible Framework and Evaluation Protocol Based on Qwen3-8B

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] BERTomelo: Your Portuguese Encoder Best Friend
item.description: BERTomelo: Your Portuguese Encoder Best Friend

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Conversational Domain Adaptation of IndicTrans2 across 21 Indic Languages via Experience Replay and Model Soups
item.description: Conversational Domain Adaptation of IndicTrans2 across 21 Indic Languages via Experience Replay and Model Soups

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Can AI Draw Science? A Benchmark for Evaluating Scientific Figure Generation by Text-to-Image and Multimodal Models
item.description: Researchers introduce SciDraw-Bench, a benchmark evaluating text-to-image models' ability to generate scientific figures across eight types and ten disciplines.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] On the Necessity of a Liquid Substrate for Mesh Intelligence
item.description: Study demonstrates liquid networks are necessary for mesh intelligence systems lacking shared clocks, coordinators, and retraining capability when processing irregularly-timed data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Position: RL Researchers Need to Distinguish Between Solving Simulators and Using Simulators as a Proxy
item.description: RL researchers often conflate solving simulators with using them as deployment proxies, requiring distinct approaches, algorithms, and evaluation metrics.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Learning to Distributedly Estimate under Partially Known Dynamics: A Covariance-Agnostic Neural Kalman Consensus Filter
item.description: Covariance-Agnostic Neural Kalman Consensus Filter combines domain knowledge with neural networks for distributed latent state estimation, outperforming traditional Kalman and particle filters.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] S-GAI: Spectral Geometry-Aware Initialization for Sigmoidal MLPs -- From Dataset Geometry to Network Weights
item.description: S-GAI proposes spectral geometry-aware weight initialization for sigmoidal MLPs using SVD-based class geometry, outperforming Xavier initialization on image datasets.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] scKDGM: KAN-guided Dynamic Graph Masked Learning for Single-Cell RNA-seq Clustering
item.description: scKDGM integrates masked learning with dynamic graph optimization for single-cell RNA sequencing clustering, outperforming 10 baseline methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Counterfactual Residual Data Augmentation for Regression
item.description: Counterfactual Residual Data Augmentation (CRDA) generates synthetic training samples for tabular regression by exploiting residual invariance, improving regressor accuracy on limited data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Singular Learning and Occam's Razor in Deep Monomial Networks
item.description: Critical points in deep monomial networks occur at subnetworks with inactive neurons, mathematically explaining the implicit bias toward simpler functions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] An Agentic AI Pipeline for Appliance-Level Energy Anomaly Detection and LLM-Driven Recommendations
item.description: An Agentic AI Pipeline for Appliance-Level Energy Anomaly Detection and LLM-Driven Recommendations

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Modelling Emotional Memory in Children with Tensor Networks
item.description: Modelling Emotional Memory in Children with Tensor Networks

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Trainable-by-Parts Operator Learning Framework: Bridging DeepONet and Karhunen-Loeve Expansions for Large-Scale Applications
item.description: A Trainable-by-Parts Operator Learning Framework: Bridging DeepONet and Karhunen-Loeve Expansions for Large-Scale Applications

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Gravitational Interpretation of Fine-Tuning Reversion
item.description: A Gravitational Interpretation of Fine-Tuning Reversion

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] NIVA: A Multimodal Foundation Model for Actionable Earth System Intelligence
item.description: NIVA: A Multimodal Foundation Model for Actionable Earth System Intelligence

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Improving Coherence in Hierarchical Time Series Forecasting using Structured Temporal Fusion
item.description: Improving Coherence in Hierarchical Time Series Forecasting using Structured Temporal Fusion

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Geometric Measurements of the Axiom of Choice in Neural Proof Embeddings
item.description: Geometric Measurements of the Axiom of Choice in Neural Proof Embeddings

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Replica Symmetry Breaking and Algorithmic Thresholds in Empirical Risk Minimization under Multi-Index Model
item.description: Replica Symmetry Breaking and Algorithmic Thresholds in Empirical Risk Minimization under Multi-Index Model

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] What LLMs explain is not what they believe: Evaluating explanation sufficiency under models' own input beliefs
item.description: What LLMs explain is not what they believe: Evaluating explanation sufficiency under models' own input beliefs

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Randomized Exploration for Linear Bandits via Absolute Perturbations
item.description: Randomized Exploration for Linear Bandits via Absolute Perturbations

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Improving Patient Subtyping on Longitudinal Data using Representations from Mamba-based Architecture
item.description: Improving Patient Subtyping on Longitudinal Data using Representations from Mamba-based Architecture

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] When More Sampling Hurts: The Modal Ceiling and Correlation Ceiling of Test-Time Scaling
item.description: When More Sampling Hurts: The Modal Ceiling and Correlation Ceiling of Test-Time Scaling

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Closed-Form Steepest Descent Direction toward Flat Minima: Reducing Upper Bounds on the Loss Hessian Eigenspectrum in Neural Networks
item.description: Closed-Form Steepest Descent Direction toward Flat Minima: Reducing Upper Bounds on the Loss Hessian Eigenspectrum in Neural Networks

item.description: Entropy Regularized Reinforcement Learning for Zero-Sum Stochastic Differential Games in a Regime-Switching Jump-Diffusion Process

item.description: Entropy-Regularized Reinforcement Learning for Linear-Quadratic Stackelberg Differential Games in Regime-Switching Diffusion Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Constrained Tabular Diffusion for Finance
item.description: Constrained Tabular Diffusion for Finance

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Path-Space Formulation of Prediction in World Models: From a Single Action to Prediction, Planning, and Irreversibility
item.description: A Path-Space Formulation of Prediction in World Models: From a Single Action to Prediction, Planning, and Irreversibility

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Hierarchical Decision Making with Structured Policies: A Principled Design via Inverse Optimization
item.description: Hierarchical Decision Making with Structured Policies: A Principled Design via Inverse Optimization

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Generative Learning as a Tool to Improve Perception of Emotional Body Motion Expressions
item.description: Generative Learning as a Tool to Improve Perception of Emotional Body Motion Expressions

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] On design-unbiased algorithmic Machine Learning
item.description: On design-unbiased algorithmic Machine Learning

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] HARD-KV: Head-Adaptive Regularization for Decoding-time KV Compression
item.description: HARD-KV: Head-Adaptive Regularization for Decoding-time KV Compression

item.description: Active Quantum Kernel Acquisition for Gaussian Process Regression
